meta.title: Matchic — Your Private Wardrobe Brain
meta.description: Matchic helps you remember what you own, discover forgotten outfits, and buy less — with AI that runs entirely on your device. No uploads. No tracking. Open source.
meta.ogDescription: AI wardrobe assistant that runs entirely on your phone. No cloud. No tracking. Open source.
meta.twitterDescription: Know what you own. Wear what you love. Privately.

hero.title: Your Private Wardrobe Brain
hero.subtitle:
Know what you own. Wear what you love.
All with AI that lives on your phone — never in the cloud.

problem.title: You Own More Than You Remember
problem.subtitle: Most people wear only a fraction of their wardrobe. Clothes get buried, forgotten, and replaced — while perfectly good pieces sit unworn.
problem.stat2Label: spent yearly on clothes that go unworn
problem.stat3Label: average time deciding what to wear daily
problem.stat4Label: of global carbon emissions from fashion

solution.title: Meet Matchic
solution.subtitle: An AI wardrobe assistant that lives entirely on your phone. It helps you catalog your clothes, discover outfits you forgot about, and make the most of what you already own.
solution.point1: Snap a photo — AI tags everything automatically
solution.point2: Get outfit suggestions from your real wardrobe
solution.point3: Track what you wear and what you don't

howItWorks.title: From Chaos to Closet in Four Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take photos of your clothes. One at a time or in batches.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI recognizes colors, patterns, materials, and categories instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get outfit suggestions based on what you actually own.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Log what you wear. See patterns. Shop smarter.

appPreview.title: Your Wardrobe, Beautifully Organized
appPreview.subtitle: A clean, intuitive interface that makes managing your closet feel effortless.
appPreview.caption: Matchic running on-device with zero cloud dependency

features.title: Everything You Need
features.feature1Desc: Point your camera at any piece of clothing. Matchic identifies the category, color, material, and style — all on your device.
features.feature2Desc: Stuck on what to wear? Matchic suggests combinations from your real wardrobe, not from a store.
features.feature3Desc: See what you wear most, what sits unused, and how much you actually use your closet.
features.feature4Desc: Works without internet. Your data never leaves your phone. Ever.
features.feature5Desc: Open the app and start. No email, no password, no cloud sync.
features.feature6Desc: The code is public. You can verify our privacy claims yourself.

onDeviceAI.title: Your Photos Never Leave Your Phone
onDeviceAI.subtitle: Matchic uses MediaPipe and Gemma 3 to process everything locally. We physically cannot see your photos because we don't have servers.
onDeviceAI.point1Desc: AI models run directly on your device using MediaPipe GenAI.
onDeviceAI.point2Desc: Every photo stays on your phone. No server. No database.
onDeviceAI.point3Desc: Use Matchic on a plane, in a basement, anywhere. No connection needed.
onDeviceAI.point4Desc: Export, backup, or delete everything anytime. It's yours.

privacyComparison.title: How Matchic Compares
privacyComparison.subtitle: We built Matchic differently because we believe your wardrobe is personal.

sustainability.title: Wear More. Buy Less.
sustainability.subtitle: The most sustainable outfit is the one already in your closet. Matchic helps you fall in love with your clothes again.
sustainability.point1Desc: Discover outfits you forgot you had. Reduce impulse purchases.
sustainability.point2Desc: See what you actually wear. Buy only what you need.
sustainability.point3Desc: Build a versatile, curated wardrobe that works harder.
sustainability.point4Desc: Make informed decisions about what to keep, donate, or buy.

openSource.title: Built in Public. Verified by You.
openSource.subtitle: Matchic is open source under the MIT License. Every line of code is available for review. We have nothing to hide because we have nothing to collect.

waitlist.title: Be the First to Try Matchic
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist and be notified when Matchic launches. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
waitlist.successMessage: We'll notify you when Matchic is ready. Thank you for your interest.
waitlist.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.privacyNote: We won't share your email. We won't track you. We don't even have a server.

faq.title: Questions? We Have Answers.
faq.a1: Yes. Matchic is free and open source. We don't sell data because we don't collect any.
faq.a2: No. You can use Matchic without creating an account. Your data stays on your device.
faq.a3: Yes. All features work without internet. The AI runs entirely on your phone.
faq.a4: No. Your photos never leave your device. They are processed locally by on-device AI.
faq.a5: Matchic uses Google's MediaPipe GenAI framework and Gemma 3 model, both running locally on your device.
faq.a6: Yes. Your wardrobe data is stored locally and can be exported or backed up anytime.
faq.q7: Is the code really open source?
faq.a7: Yes. Matchic is released under the MIT License. You can view, fork, and contribute to the code on GitHub.
faq.q8: Will there be an iOS version?
faq.a8: Yes. We are building for both iOS and Android. Join the waitlist to be notified.
faq.q9: How is this different from other wardrobe apps?
faq.a9: Matchic is the only wardrobe app that runs AI entirely on your device with zero cloud dependency. Your privacy is not a feature — it's the foundation.
faq.q10: Can I contribute to the project?
faq.a10: Absolutely. We welcome contributors. Check out our GitHub repository for guidelines.

finalCTA.title: Ready to Know Your Wardrobe?
finalCTA.subtitle: Join thousands who want a smarter, more private way to manage their clothes.

footer.tagline: Your wardrobe, understood — completely on your device.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Matchic. Open source under MIT License.
footer.madeWith: Made with care for people who value privacy.
